content.title: Build a career with us.
content.paragraph1: At Maxima Concrete we pour more than driveways. We pour careers. Every project our crew touches is something they can drive past for decades and say: I built that.
content.paragraph2: We are a tight-knit team that takes pride in the craft, shows up on time, and treats every customer like a neighbor. If that sounds like you, we want to meet you.

items.title: Concrete Finisher
items.description: 2+ years finishing flatwork. Reliable transport and a strong work ethic required.

items.title: Crew Foreman
items.description: Lead a 3-5 person crew, run jobs on time and on budget, and mentor new finishers.

items.title: Laborer / Helper
items.description: Entry-level role. We train. Show up, work hard, and we will teach you a trade.

items.title: Form Setter
items.description: Set and strip forms for driveways, patios, and walls. Experience preferred.

content.title: Roles we are hiring for.
content.description: Do not see your role? We are always interested in great people. Send us your resume anyway.

content.title: Ready to pour your career in concrete?
content.description: Send your resume and a quick note about why you would be a good fit. We respond within a few business days.

items.title: Competitive weekly pay
items.description: Above-market wages, paid weekly, with overtime for every hour earned.

items.title: Real growth path
items.description: Clear promotion track from helper to lead finisher to crew foreman.

items.title: Quality tools and trucks
items.description: We give you the equipment to do the job right the first time.

items.title: Safety first
items.description: OSHA-compliant gear, training, and a zero-tolerance safety culture.

items.title: Year-round work
items.description: Steady schedule from spring through fall, with winter projects when weather permits.

items.title: Crew that has your back
items.description: Tight team, no drama, and bosses who actually swing a trowel.

content.title: What we offer.
content.description: We invest in our crew so they can do their best work and build a life they are proud of.
